message:
refactor(fcp-crypto): clippy fixes, const fn annotations, and doc improvements

Apply pedantic clippy lints and documentation improvements:

aead.rs:
- Add const fn to AeadKey::from_bytes and AeadKey::as_bytes
- Reorder imports alphabetically
- Fix formatting for long function signatures
- Add backticks around XChaCha20 in doc comments

canonicalize.rs:
- Add const fn to NodeSignature::new
- Add backticks around signature, quorum_signatures, node_id in docs
- Fix error message formatting for sorted validation

cose.rs:
- Reorder imports alphabetically
- Add backticks around COSE_Sign1 in docs
- Add new FCP2 claim constants:
  - ISS_NODE (-65543): Issuing node ID
  - AUD_BINARY (-65544): Binary audience (ObjectId)
  - GRANT_OBJECT_IDS (-65545): Grant Object IDs
  - HOLDER_NODE (-65546): Holder node ID
  - CHK_ID/CHK_SEQ (-65547/-65548): Checkpoint claims
  - CONSTRAINTS (-65549): Capability constraints
  - GRANTS (-65550): Granted capabilities array
  - INSTANCE_ID (-65551): Instance ID

ed25519.rs, hpke_seal.rs, kid.rs, mac.rs, x25519.rs:
- Import reordering and formatting fixes
- Documentation backtick additions

lib.rs:
- Reorder re-exports alphabetically
- Update doc example with clearer variable names
- Fix numeric literal formatting (1234567890 → 1_234_567_890)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
